utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. In the final coverage plan, all 5 items are present. Each one includes the necessary details: health_coverage includes provider, type of coverage, and costs (monthly and annual); property_coverage includes provider, coverage details, and costs; travel_coverage includes provider, coverage description, and costs; additional_services lists enhancement services with associated costs or boolean indicators; total_budget gives the monthly and annual totals. All are fully specified according to the format.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main insurance components: health (LifeFirst / HealthFirst), property (LifeFirst), and travel (PrimeTravel). To map these to ground-truth ratings, we identify the corresponding rated plans: for health, both LifeFirst Standard Plan (rating 9) and HealthFirst Standard Plan (rating 8) under 'primary_health_coverage'; for property, LifeFirst Standard Coverage (rating 9) under 'property_protection'; and for travel, PrimeTravel Premium Plan (rating 6) under 'mobility_coverage'. Additional services include gym membership reimbursement (maps to 'Gym Membership Reimbursement' with rating 4), travel assistance service (maps to '24/7 Travel Assistance' with rating 4), wellness programs (maps to 'Wellness Programs' with rating 3), concierge service (maps to 'Concierge Services' with rating 2), and premium membership (maps to 'Premium Insurance Membership' with rating 6).
